content: Resolved by unifying all validator return formats to :error + :message. Dispatch validators (validate-path-tool, validate-pattern-tool, validate-bash-tool) updated to match pipeline validators. build-violation-info simplified to read :message directly with no fallback chains. :reason removed from all validator returns. Commit: 4490f65.

Resolved: all inline mock construction now routes through contract-validated helpers (helpers-spec--make-file-op). file-ops-spec--make-file-op delegates to the contract helper. No unvalidated mocks remain in scope tests. The contract enforcement is the audit.

Resolved: file-ops-spec--make-file-op now delegates to helpers-spec--make-file-op which validates against contract/bash-file-op--validate on every construction. All inline plist construction in path-resolution-spec.el and comprehensive-nil-handling-spec.el replaced with helper calls. Drift guard is the contract validation itself.

Resolved: 29 real integration tests in bash-parser-integration-spec.el (8 command scenarios), 11 operation types in Layer 5 corpus (contract-layers-spec), plus 3 real-validator integration tests in expansion-integration-spec.el. Total 40+ tests with no mocking of bash-parse or bash-extract-semantics. Far exceeds the acceptance criteria of 8.

Resolved: bash-parser output validated against contract (contract/bash-file-op--validate), scope validator consumes same contract-shaped data. Layer 5 corpus tests verify real parse output satisfies contract. bash-parser-integration-spec.el feeds real parser output through real validate-file-operation. All mock helpers validate against contract on construction. The :file/:path mismatch class of bug cannot recur.
